title: Junior Project Manager
required_skills: Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Business, or related field
Proficiency in project management tools (MS Project, Primavera, or similar)
matched_skills: 1–3 years project management experience (HSBC PMO 2021–2022, Hapag-Lloyd Project Coordination 2024–2025)
Budget tracking and financial governance (USD 8M programme)
Project status reporting and KPI dashboards
core_responsibilities: Manage small, straightforward projects through full lifecycle (initiation to closeout)
Develop and maintain project plans, schedules, and budgets
Lead project meetings, document decisions, and track action items
Track project expenses against approved budgets and manage contract milestones
recommended_emphasis: Highlight full project lifecycle experience at HSBC (programme coordination across 6 workstreams)
Quantify budget ownership: USD 8M programme financial governance directly maps to budget tracking requirement
Emphasise cross-functional coordination and meeting facilitation from both Hapag-Lloyd and HSBC roles
Reference JIRA and Confluence as project management tooling; note familiarity with structured scheduling
Frame Hapag-Lloyd agile sprint coordination as evidence of schedule and delivery management
Soft-pedal engineering design gap; emphasise operational PM skills that dominate the JD
